zh.Prince George, Virginia, British Colonia: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州普林斯 喬治
zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Lightfoot Tucker於1695年3月出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州威斯特摩蘭時，她的父親William Gerard Tucker45歲，母親Elizabeth Allen7歲。她於1720年與Richard Talley在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州普林斯 喬治普林斯 喬治結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1765年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州阿梅莉亞享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Lightfoot Tucker于1695年3月出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州威斯特摩蘭时，她的父亲William Gerard Tucker45岁，母亲Elizabeth Allen7岁。她于1720年与Richard Talley在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州普林斯 喬治普林斯 喬治结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1765年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州阿梅莉亞享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: Tucker
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southwestern): occupational name from Middle English tuker(e), toker(e) ‘tucker, fuller’, a derivative of tuken ‘to torment, beat’ (Old English tūcian), for someone who fulled and finished cloth. This name for the occupation was characteristic of the West Country. Compare Fuller and Walker and see also Tuckerman .
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Tuachair ‘descendant of Tuachar’, a personal name composed of the elements tuath ‘people’ + car ‘dear, beloved’.
Americanized form of Jewish Tocker or Toker (see Tokarz ).

variants.name: Tooker
meanings: English (Devon) and Irish: variant of   Tucker  .

variants.name: Tuckerman
meanings: English: from Middle English tuker(e), toker(e) ‘tucker, fuller’ (see Tucker 1) + -man, either for a tucker, or for his servant or assistant.

variants.name: Fuller
meanings: English: occupational name for a dresser of cloth, from Middle English fuller ‘fuller of cloth’ (partly from Old English fullere, partly from Old French fouleor, foleur, Latin fullo). Raw cloth had to be fulled, i.e. scoured, cleansed, and thickened by beating or trampling it in water, a process also known as walking or tucking, hence the surnames Walker and Tucker alongside Fuller. These three terms and surnames are characteristic of different parts of England. In general, in Middle English, Fuller is southern and eastern, while Walker belongs to the west and north and Tucker is southwestern. Compare Fullen .
English: variant of Fullard with loss of -d.
German (Füller): occupational name for a person whose work involved filling, such as a dauber, or a nickname for a gourmand or glutton. Compare Filler .

variants.name: Swinger
meanings: English: occupational name, perhaps for a fuller, who finished cloth by beating it and stretching it on tenters. Middle English swyngere is not independently recorded but it appears to be an agent derivative of Middle English swingen ‘to beat, strike, punish, afflict (something)’. Compare the synonymous Tucker , an agent derivative of Middle English tuken ‘to torment, beat’. The earliest bearers of the name Swinger were wealthy townsmen.
In some instances probably an Americanized form of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic) Schwinger , or German Zwinger, a nickname from Middle High German zwinger ‘oppressor’.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

nameMeanings.name: Lightfoot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly northern England, especially Cheshire): nickname for a messenger or for a fast runner, from Middle English lyght ‘light, nimble, quick’ (Old English līoht) + fote ‘foot’.

historicEvents.title: Mount Vernon
historicEvents.description: Mount Vernon Plantation was the home of George Washington. It started off as 2,000 acres and was later expanded to 8,000 acres. The house itself started off as a six room building then got extended to twenty-one rooms.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Lightfoot Tucker was born in March 1695, in Westmoreland, Virginia, British Colonial America, her father, William Gerard Tucker, was 45 and her mother, Elizabeth Allen, was 7. She married Richard Talley in 1720, in Prince George, Prince George, Virginia, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1765, in Amelia, Virginia, British Colonial America, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Lightfoot Tucker est née en mars 1695, à Westmoreland, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, William Gerard Tucker, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Allen, avait 7 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Talley en 1720, à Prince George, Prince George, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1765, à Amelia, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 70 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Lightfoot Tuckerが1695年3月にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ウエストモーエランドで生まれた時，父William Gerard Tuckerは45歳，母Elizabeth Allenは7歳であった。1720年にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州プリンス ジョーッジプリンス ジョーッジでRichard Talleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1765年にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州エイメリアで70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Lightfoot Tucker(이)가 1695년 3월 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 웨스트모렐랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Gerard Tucker(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Allen(은)는 7세였다. 그녀는 1720년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 프린스 조지 프린스 조지에서 Richard Talley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1765년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 아밀리야에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.Prince George, Virginia, British Colonia: Prince George, Virginia, British Colonial America
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Lightfoot Tucker nasceu em março de 1695, em Westmoreland, Virginia, British Colonial America, seu pai, William Gerard Tucker, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Allen, tinha 7 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Talley em 1720, em Prince George, Prince George, Virginia, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1765, em Amelia, Virginia, British Colonial America, com 70 anos.

ru.Prince George, Virginia, British Colonia: принц джеордж, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Lightfoot Tucker родилась марта 1695 г. в местности вестмореланд, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени William Gerard Tucker было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Allen, 7. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Talley в 1720 г. в местности принц джеордж, принц джеордж, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1765 г. в местности амеля, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Lightfoot Tucker nació en marzo de 1695, en Westmoreland, Virginia, British Colonial America, su papá, William Gerard Tucker, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Allen, tenía 7 años. Se casó con Richard Talley en 1720, en Prince George, Prince George, Virginia, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1765, en Amelia, Virginia, British Colonial America, a la edad de 70 años.
